scene_segments.description: A person in a plaid jacket is seen from behind, facing into an elegant restaurant or hotel lobby filled with white flowers, warm lighting, and staff members, while a text overlay reading 'Based on a Real DM from Ed Sheeran' appears on screen.

A person in a plaid jacket stands in an elegant entryway flanked by white flowers, followed by shots of a grand, warmly lit dining room where staff members move among tables of seated diners in a formal restaurant setting.

The segment begins with a wide shot of an elegant, upscale restaurant dining room with seated diners and staff members moving through the space, then cuts to a close-up of a warmly lit paneled wall with decorative molding and a wall sconce.
The camera is focused on an elegant interior wall featuring decorative molding and a wall sconce emitting warm light, with no people visible in frame.

The camera pans from an elegantly decorated wall with warm sconce lighting and decorative molding to reveal a formally set dining table with silverware, glassware, a white napkin, a candle holder, and white flowers.

The segment shows a close-up of an elegantly set dining table with fine silverware, a white napkin, glassware, and white flowers, then cuts to a man in a tuxedo playing a grand piano in a warmly lit, upscale restaurant dining room with guests seated in the background.
A man in a tuxedo is playing a grand piano in an elegantly lit dining room, with a woman seated at a table visible in the background.

The segment shows a man in a tuxedo looking downward, likely near a dining or event setting, alongside shots of a reception desk area labeled 'Super Posh' with a staff member behind it, flanked by a plant and white orchid arrangement on a side table.

A woman in a black dress is engaged in conversation with a person in a plaid jacket, speaking animatedly near what appears to be the restaurant reception area with white orchids and a plant visible in the background.

A smiling woman in a black dress is engaged in conversation with a man in a plaid jacket who has curly red hair, shown from behind in the foreground before the camera shifts to show his face in profile.

A close-up shot of a red-haired, bearded man in a plaid jacket seen in profile, with another person partially visible in the foreground to his left, both appearing to watch or listen to something off-camera.
Two staff members attend to a seated diner at a white-tablecloth table in an elegant dining room, while a man in a vest and tie appears in the foreground in a separate shot.
A man in a vest and tie stands in an elegantly lit interior space with decorative columns and warm lighting, appearing to speak or present while facing the camera.
A man with curly red hair smiles and looks around in a restaurant setting, followed by a staff member in a vest and tie presenting a silver cloche in an elegant dining room.
A man in a plaid jacket sits alone at a white-tablecloth dining table in an upscale restaurant, looking up as a staff member approaches holding a silver cloche overhead.
A man in a vest and tie is shown in close-up speaking or reacting expressively in what appears to be an elegant dining room with warm lighting and decorative ceiling details.

A person in a plaid jacket sits alone at a table in an upscale restaurant dining room, while a person in a white chef uniform stands near a glass door in what appears to be a separate shot within the same segment.

A person in a white chef uniform stands near a glass door while in the foreground a person in a plaid jacket sits at a table with glassware and a plated dish, with seated diners visible in the background of what appears to be an upscale restaurant.
A person in a plaid jacket sits alone at a elegantly set dining table, leaning forward and holding a small chihuahua while other diners are visible in the background.

Two elegantly dressed women are seated at a table in an upscale dining setting, with one woman in a plaid jacket and another in light-colored clothing holding a small chihuahua, both looking off to the side with serious expressions.
Two elegantly dressed women sit at a table in a upscale restaurant, one holding a small chihuahua, while a person in a plaid jacket leans over an adjacent table applying condiment to a plated dish.
A person in a plaid jacket is squeezing a condiment bottle (appears to be Heinz ketchup) over a plated dish on a white tablecloth in a restaurant setting.
A man in a plaid jacket sits alone at a white-tablecloth table in an upscale restaurant, appearing to use his phone, while a staff member in a white uniform stands nearby attending to him.

A person in a plaid jacket sits alone at a white-tablecloth table in an elegant restaurant, appearing to interact with something on the table while a staff member stands nearby and other diners are visible in the background.

A person in a plaid jacket sits alone at a white-tablecloth dining table in an elegant restaurant, while nearby a small chihuahua wearing a colorful beaded necklace is held by someone in light-colored clothing.

A small chihuahua wearing a colorful beaded necklace is being held by a person in light-colored clothing, while at a nearby dining table a person in a plaid jacket is drinking from a red cup with a plated dish and glassware in front of them.

A man in a vest and tie stands prominently in an elegant, warmly lit dining room, while in a separate close-up shot a person in a plaid jacket drinks from a red cup at a table with place settings and a plated dish.
A man in a vest and tie stands in an elegant, warmly lit hall with decorative arched columns and white flowers visible in the background, appearing to speak or sing directly toward the camera.

A man in a plaid jacket sits at a elegantly set dining table holding a small red condiment bottle, while in the background seated diners and staff are visible; the scene cuts to a close-up of a man in a vest and tie looking upward.

A man in a vest and tie is shown in close-up facing slightly upward, then the camera cuts to show a man in a plaid jacket seated at a white-tablecloth dining table, cutting into a plated dish with a condiment bottle (ketchup) beside him amid glassware and seated diners in the background.

Ed Sheeran is seated at a fine dining table in an upscale restaurant, applying Heinz Tomato Ketchup to his plated dish, followed by a close-up of the Heinz ketchup bottle with an 'Ed Sheeran x Heinz' branded text overlay.
A close-up shot of a Heinz Tomato Ketchup bottle on a dining table, with a text overlay showing 'Ed Sheeran x Heinz' branding, indicating this is a promotional or advertisement segment.

justification_timeline.justification: The opening shot establishes the premise of the ad: a person (implied to be Ed Sheeran) entering a posh restaurant, while the text overlay 'Based on a Real DM from Ed Sheeran' immediately hooks viewers with a celebrity connection and signals this is a humorous, relatable story.

Continuing the establishment of the setting and premise, the full text overlay 'Based on a real DM from Ed Sheeran' is displayed clearly, ensuring viewers understand the celebrity context before the narrative unfolds.

This shot reinforces the elegance and grandeur of the venue by showing the person framed by white flower arrangements and ornate decor, setting up the contrast between the upscale environment and Ed Sheeran's presumably casual request.

A wide establishing shot of the grand restaurant interior—staff serving guests, classical architecture, white tablecloths—emphasizes the extreme poshness of the venue, which is essential to understanding the comedic contrast with the DM's content.
A close-up of the elegant paneled wall and wall sconce reinforces the upscale atmosphere of the restaurant, building the sense that this is an extraordinarily fancy establishment.

A detailed close-up of the formal place setting—silverware, glassware, candle holder, white flowers—underscores the restaurant's high-end nature, amplifying the comedic contrast when Ed Sheeran's presumably un-posh request is revealed.

A tuxedo-clad pianist playing a grand piano in the dining room further elevates the restaurant's prestige and formality, deepening the comedic setup about how out-of-place a casual DM request would be in this context.

Continued shots of the pianist performing reinforce the restaurant's sophisticated ambiance, maintaining the visual contrast being built before the punchline of Ed Sheeran's actual DM request is delivered.

Showing the man in a tuxedo at a dining table with a woman in the background continues to build the opulent, formal atmosphere of the restaurant setting that makes Ed Sheeran's casual DM all the more amusing.

The reception desk labeled (implied) 'Super Posh' with orchids and a plant signals the restaurant's high-end branding, grounding the viewer in just how fancy the establishment is—key to the ad's humor.

The woman in a black dress conversing with the person in a plaid jacket likely represents restaurant staff greeting Ed Sheeran, introducing the human interaction that will lead to fulfilling his unconventional DM request.

The woman's smile during conversation with the plaid-jacketed person (Ed Sheeran) suggests a warm, perhaps amused reception, hinting that the staff is accommodating an unusual request with professionalism and good humor.

The first clear profile view of the red-haired, bearded man confirms the identity of the person as Ed Sheeran, paying off the earlier text overlay and giving viewers a recognizable face to follow through the narrative.

Staff members attending attentively to Ed Sheeran at his table highlights the restaurant's exceptional service, which makes the fulfillment of his unusual DM request (likely involving ketchup or the chihuahua) even more comedic.
The man in a vest and tie—likely a head waiter or manager—is introduced as a key character who will react to and fulfill Ed Sheeran's request, setting up his expressive reactions later in the video.
A sustained shot of the staff member in vest and tie establishes him as a central comedic character whose formal demeanor will contrast with the absurdity of Ed Sheeran's request.

Ed Sheeran smiling and looking around the restaurant conveys his delight and anticipation, suggesting he is genuinely enjoying the experience and perhaps waiting to see how the restaurant handles his unconventional DM.
The waiter presenting a silver cloche is a classic fine-dining reveal moment, building theatrical tension about what is under the cover—likely the comedic fulfillment of Ed Sheeran's DM request.

Ed Sheeran looking up as a staff member dramatically lifts a silver cloche over his table is the narrative climax setup—the formal presentation of whatever he requested via DM, amplifying the comedic contrast.
The head waiter's reaction shot (looking to the side) suggests he is witnessing or responding to the reveal, building comedic suspense through his formal demeanor facing an absurd situation.

The head waiter's expressive, exaggerated facial reaction conveys comedic disbelief or resignation at whatever Ed Sheeran requested, delivering humor through his contrast with the restaurant's formality.

The waiter speaking or reacting open-mouthed continues the comedic reaction sequence, likely narrating or responding to the absurdity of fulfilling Ed Sheeran's DM in this extremely upscale environment.
Ed Sheeran sitting alone at the elegantly set table while staff move around him reinforces his position as a regular person in an extraordinary setting, grounding the relatable humor of the ad.
A person in a white chef uniform appearing near a glass door suggests the kitchen is involved in fulfilling Ed Sheeran's request, showing the full restaurant operation mobilized for his unusual DM.

Ed Sheeran looking down at his plate suggests his request has been fulfilled, while the elegant surroundings maintain the comedic contrast between the venue's grandeur and whatever casual thing he asked for.

The reveal that Ed Sheeran is holding a small chihuahua at the dining table is the comedic punchline—his DM apparently requested bringing a dog to this ultra-posh restaurant, with a grand piano visible in the background emphasizing the absurdity.

Two women at the table, one holding the chihuahua and looking toward camera, extends the comedic moment and shows the dog is now part of the dining experience, confirming this was Ed Sheeran's unusual DM request.

Ed Sheeran squeezing what appears to be ketchup (a Heinz product) onto his fine dining plate is a second comedic reveal—combining the mundane condiment with upscale food—likely tying directly to the DM's content and potentially the brand being advertised.

Ed Sheeran at the table with a staff member attending him while he appears to use his phone connects back to the DM premise and likely showcases him enjoying the result of his request (ketchup on fine dining), reinforcing the ad's humor.

A wide shot showing Ed Sheeran at his table, the grand piano, and diners in the background consolidates all elements of the ad's comedic scenario—celebrity, ultra-posh restaurant, live music, and his casual DM request fulfilled.

The close-up of the chihuahua wearing a colorful beaded necklace is a charming, humorous final beat—the dog has been dressed up to match the restaurant's formality, delivering a visual punchline that ends the minute on a lighthearted note.

Shows Ed Sheeran (in plaid jacket) casually dining at an upscale restaurant and drinking from a red cup, establishing him as a regular person who enjoys restaurants — setting up the humorous contrast of bringing ketchup to a fine dining setting.

Introduces the man in vest and tie (likely a maître d' or restaurant staff) standing in the elegant dining room, establishing the upscale, formal restaurant environment that contrasts with Ed Sheeran's casual ketchup habit.

The man in vest and tie singing or speaking directly to camera adds a performative, theatrical element — likely part of a comedic or musical narrative beat in the ad, reinforcing the upscale restaurant atmosphere.

Close-up of the man in vest and tie facing camera in the elegant interior reinforces the formal, high-end restaurant setting, heightening the comedic contrast of Ed Sheeran insisting on Heinz ketchup in such a venue.

Ed Sheeran is shown holding a red cup (mirroring his ketchup bottle) at the fine dining table, reinforcing his everyman persona — someone who brings Heinz ketchup even to upscale restaurants, the core premise of the campaign.

The man in vest and tie looking upward in the elegant dining room suggests a reaction shot — possibly exasperation or disbelief at Ed Sheeran's ketchup usage in his restaurant, driving the comedic narrative.

Ed Sheeran is shown cutting into his fine dining dish with a Heinz ketchup bottle visibly on the table beside him — the key comedic payoff moment showing him applying ketchup to upscale food, central to the campaign's message.

Close-up of the Heinz Tomato Ketchup bottle on the restaurant table with the 'Ed Sheeran x Heinz' text overlay directly brands the product and collaboration, serving as the advertisement's explicit product reveal and branding moment.

Sustained close-up of the Heinz ketchup bottle with the 'Ed Sheeran x Heinz' text overlay acts as the closing branding shot, cementing the product identity and collaboration in the viewer's memory as the ad concludes.

background_updates.narration: A woman in a plaid jacket dines in an upscale restaurant setting, apparently part of a comedic or dramatic skit inspired by a real direct message.

The woman in the plaid jacket appears to be in an upscale restaurant, with the scene framed as a comedic skit "Based on a Real DM from Ed Sheeran," suggesting she's reenacting or responding to a message from the musician.

The scene continues in the elegant restaurant, with the woman in the plaid jacket navigating the dining room as part of the comedic skit based on Ed Sheeran's DM, with close-up shots highlighting the upscale table settings and decor.

The woman in the plaid jacket continues her comedic journey through the upscale restaurant, with the elegant ambiance—including the tuxedo-clad pianist and refined table settings—contrasting humorously with the skit's premise.

The woman in the plaid jacket appears to be interacting with staff at the reception desk, while the elegant restaurant setting with its piano, flowers, and formal decor continues to provide a humorous backdrop to the comedic skit.

The woman in the plaid jacket appears to be conversing with a man with curly red hair, possibly a staff member or another character, continuing the comedic interaction in the elegant restaurant setting.
The man in the vest and tie appears to be addressing or interacting with someone in the elegant restaurant, while staff members continue attending to the dining area around him.
The red-haired, bearded man continues to observe his surroundings in the elegant dining room, while the man in the vest and tie appears to be presenting or serving a dish with a silver cloche nearby.

The man in the vest and tie continues to interact with diners in the elegant restaurant, while the silver cloche presentation appears to be concluding. The overall dining room atmosphere remains formal and bustling with seated guests.
The person in the plaid jacket remains seated at the dining table, continuing to be the focal point as restaurant staff move around them in the formal dining room setting.
The person in the plaid jacket continues to be seated at the dining table, with activity from staff and other diners ongoing in the formal restaurant environment.
The woman in the plaid jacket continues dining, having just seasoned her dish with a condiment bottle, while the formal restaurant atmosphere remains active with other diners and staff nearby.

The woman in the plaid jacket continues dining at the elegantly set table, interacting with items on the table while staff members in white uniforms attend nearby, and the small chihuahua with a colorful beaded necklace remains a notable presence at the gathering.

The dining scene continues with the man in the vest and tie remaining prominent in the elegantly lit room, as the person in the plaid jacket and the chihuahua with the beaded necklace remain part of the gathering among seated diners and attentive staff.

The dining scene continues with the man in the vest and tie and the person in the plaid jacket remaining central figures, while the chihuahua with the beaded necklace and other diners and staff maintain the lively atmosphere of the elegant restaurant.
The person in the plaid jacket continues dining, interacting with their meal, while the man in the vest and tie remains present in the elegant restaurant setting amid the ongoing lively atmosphere.
